name: AETHLON MEDICAL INC
business: Aethlon Medical is a medical therapeutic company developing the Hemopurifier, a clinical-stage immunotherapeutic device designed to remove enveloped viruses and extracellular vesicles from blood. The device targets oncology, life-threatening infectious diseases, and organ transplantation. The Hemopurifier has Breakthrough Device designation from the FDA for advanced cancer and life-threatening viruses.

exposures.sentence: We are a medical therapeutic company focused on developing the Hemopurifier (HP), a clinical-stage investigational immunotherapeutic device designed to address unmet needs in oncology, life-threatening infectious diseases, organ transplantation and other disease states in which extracellular vesicles (EVs) contribute to disease progression.

catalysts.event: Completed enrollment and treatment of first cohort in Australian oncology trial
catalysts.sentence: During fiscal year 2026, we completed enrollment and treatment of the first cohort of three participants, each of whom received a single 4-hour Hemopurifier treatment.

catalysts.event: Completed enrollment and treatment of second cohort, DSMB approved advancement to third cohort
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, the Company completed the second cohort and the DSMB subsequently approved advancement to the third cohort of the study.

catalysts.event: Completed treatment of first participant in Cohort 3
catalysts.sentence: On June 4, 2026, we completed treatment of the first participant in Cohort 3 of our Australian oncology trial at Pindara Private Hospital on the Gold Coast of Australia.

catalysts.event: Two additional patients must be enrolled and treated to complete Cohort 3
catalysts.sentence: Two additional patients must be enrolled and treated to complete this Cohort 3.
